title: OneLifeOneTotem
description: This plugin will make totems less imbalanced. Now you can only use 1 totem per life.
body:
# OneLifeOneTotem
This plugin will make totems less imbalanced. Now you can only use 1 totem per life. After death, you can use totems again. There is also a function to recharge totems after sleep.

# Config

```yml
# Number of ticks to set the cooldown time
cooldown-time: 999999999

# Whether to reset the cooldown after sleeping
reload-after-sleeping: true
```
